message:
🌱 Add oauth2-proxy: New Feature: Support Oauth2 token introspection as per mission (#956)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "oauth2-proxy-612-new-feature-support-oauth2-token-introspection-as-per-rfc7662-s",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "oauth2-proxy: New Feature: Support Oauth2 token introspection as per rfc7662#section2.1",
+    "description": "New Feature: Support Oauth2 token introspection as per rfc7662#section2.1. Requested by 12+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current oauth2-proxy deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your oauth2-proxy version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oauth2-proxy\nhelm list -n oauth2-proxy 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working oauth2-proxy installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review oauth2-proxy configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant oauth2-proxy configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oauth2-proxy\nkubectl get configmap -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=oauth2-proxy\n```\n## Expected Behavior\n\nWhen calling the endpoint with directly an opaque (or not) access token, Oauth2Proxy should be able to validate the token."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for New Feature: Support Oauth2 token introspection as per…",
+        "description": "This PR add feature of Token Introspection based on [RFC7662 OAuth 2.0 Token Introspection](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc7662.html).\nThis PR add feature to validate bearer token (access token) passed by authori\n```yaml\n--provider: oidc # or any other\n      --skip-bearer-tokens: true\n      --token-instropection-url: https://IDPROVIDERSERVICE.com/api/auth/token/info\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oauth2-proxy\nkubectl get events -n oauth2-proxy --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"New Feature: Support Oauth2 token introspection as per…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR add feature of Token Introspection based on [RFC7662 OAuth 2.0 Token Introspection](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc7662.html).\nThis PR add feature to validate bearer token (access token) passed by authori",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "--provider: oidc # or any other\n      --skip-bearer-tokens: true\n      --token-instropection-url: https://IDPROVIDERSERVICE.com/api/auth/token/info"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "oauth2-proxy",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "oauth2-proxy"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy/issues/612",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy/pull/1751"
+    },
+    "reactions": 12,
+    "comments": 19,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with oauth2-proxy installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:39:29.087Z",
